# Security Checklist: Ingest open geospatial datasets

**Purpose**: Validate ingestion safety, failure isolation, and auditability.
**Created**: 2026-03-11
**Feature**: `specs/017-geospatial-ingest/spec.md`

**Note**: This checklist is generated by the `/prompts:speckit.checklist` workflow.

## Data Safety

- [x] CHK-SEC-001 Download retries and size limits prevent resource exhaustion.
- [x] CHK-SEC-002 Invalid schemas or geometries are blocked from promotion.
- [x] CHK-SEC-003 Promotion is atomic to prevent partial reads.

## Error Handling

- [x] CHK-SEC-004 Failures return actionable details without exposing sensitive data.
- [x] CHK-SEC-005 Promotion failures roll back and leave production tables intact.

## Traceability

- [x] CHK-SEC-006 Run identifiers and provenance metadata are recorded for audits.
